facebook.caption:
This place fixes travel fatigue.

Relax Spa on Hẻm Chùa Ông is the spot locals in Cửa Lấp actually book after a long beach day. Massage, waxing, nails, all under one roof. 4.9 stars across 497 reviews. That number doesn't lie.

No resort markup. No tourist-trap pricing. Just good work done properly.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
